title: Design System: AiAvatar · 数字人资产平台

display.purpose: Screen and section headings, top tabs (17px), nav titles. Manrope 700, -0.02em.

asset-name.purpose: The serif identity of a digital human. The product's single warm, editorial type gesture. Newsreader 500. Never used for UI chrome.

reg.purpose: The REG · DH-2041 asset number, prefixed by a tinted REG chip. JetBrains Mono, 0.04em.

label.purpose: Uppercase spec-sheet field labels in the dossier. JetBrains Mono 10px, 0.1em.

shadows.name: resting
shadows.purpose: Cards, badges, the default float. Barely there.

shadows.name: float
shadows.purpose: Floating shells and the desktop content column.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: The cyan focus glow on inputs and selected cards. The only colored shadow.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (buttons, cards, hover). 140 to 200ms.

motion.name: ease-out-soft
motion.purpose: Entrances: page fade-up, sheets, staggered lists. 300 to 420ms.

motion.name: ease-overshoot
motion.purpose: The one permitted overshoot: archival seal stamp-in and the raised create key press.

breakpoints.name: phone
breakpoints.purpose: At and below: app fills the viewport edge-to-edge (no rounded frame), true H5 form.

breakpoints.name: desktop-column
breakpoints.purpose: At and above: app centers as a 480px content column with a hairline and soft shadow.

breakpoints.name: layout-collapse
breakpoints.purpose: Multi-column workspace grids (detail, refine) collapse to a single column.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The high-emphasis action. Studio Cyan fill, lifts on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:40px; padding:0 16px; font-family:'Manrope',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:700; color:#fff; background:#12B3DE; border:1px solid transparent; border-radius:12px; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(20,36,55,.035),0 1px 3px rgba(20,36,55,.04); cursor:pointer; transition:all .16s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background:#0C97BE; transform:translateY(-1px); box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(20,36,55,.04),0 8px 20px rgba(20,36,55,.055); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:translateY(0) scale(.99); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline:none; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(18,179,222,.16); }

components.name: Soft Button
components.description: The quiet primary: Cyan Wash background, cyan text. Used where a full cyan fill would be too loud.
components.css: .ds-btn-soft { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; height:40px; padding:0 16px; font-family:'Manrope',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:700; color:#12B3DE; background:#E6F5FA; border:1px solid transparent; border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; transition:all .16s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); } .ds-btn-soft:hover { background:#D7EFF7; } .ds-btn-soft:active { transform:scale(.99); }

components.name: Dossier Card
components.description: White paper card on cool canvas. Serif asset name over a mono record line. Rests flat, lifts on hover.
components.html:
林深
已就绪 · 3 个版本
components.css: .ds-card { max-width:280px; background:#fff; border:1px solid #EBEFF3; border-radius:15px; padding:18px; box-shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(20,36,55,.035),0 1px 3px rgba(20,36,55,.04); transition:transform .18s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1), box-shadow .18s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); cursor:pointer; } .ds-card:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 2px 6px rgba(20,36,55,.04),0 8px 20px rgba(20,36,55,.055); } .ds-card-name { font-family:'Newsreader',Georgia,serif; font-weight:500; font-size:22px; line-height:1.04; letter-spacing:-.01em; color:#14202B; } .ds-card-sub { margin-top:6px; font-family:'Manrope',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:13px; color:#5A6873; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: White field, cool border. On focus the border turns cyan and a soft cyan ring appears, the only state change.
components.css: .ds-input { width:100%; max-width:280px; height:44px; padding:0 14px; font-family:'Manrope',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; color:#14202B; background:#fff; border:1px solid #E0E6EC; border-radius:12px; outline:none; transition:border-color .15s, box-shadow .15s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:#8A96A1; } .ds-input:focus { border-color:#12B3DE; box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(18,179,222,.16); }

components.name: Filter Pill
components.description: Selection among filters. Active is Deep Slate Ink (not cyan); selection reads as ink, action reads as cyan.
components.css: .ds-pill { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px; height:34px; min-width:84px; padding:0 15px; font-family:'Manrope',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:13px; font-weight:600; color:#5A6873; background:#EDF1F5; border:none; border-radius:999px; cursor:pointer; transition:all .14s; } .ds-pill:hover { background:#E0E6EC; } .ds-pill.is-active { background:#14202B; color:#fff; }

components.name: Category Badge
components.description: Pill status badge. The primary tone (Cyan Wash + cyan) marks the key deliverable; a leading dot is optional.
components.css: .ds-badge-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:5px; height:23px; padding:0 9px; font-family:'Manrope',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:11.5px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:.01em; color:#12B3DE; background:#E6F5FA; border-radius:999px; } .ds-badge-primary .dot { width:6px; height:6px; border-radius:99px; background:#12B3DE; }

components.name: Registration Number
components.description: Signature dossier primitive: the accessioned asset number in mono, with a tinted REG chip prefix.
components.css: .ds-reg { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:6px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:11px; font-weight:500; letter-spacing:.04em; color:#8A96A1; } .ds-reg::before { content:'REG'; font-size:8.5px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.12em; color:#8A96A1; background:#EDF1F5; padding:2px 5px; border-radius:4px; }

components.name: Archival Seal
components.description: Signature dossier primitive: a rotated, pill-outlined mono stamp in Ledger Green, reserved for archived / ready milestones.
components.css: .ds-seal { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:6px; font-family:'JetBrains Mono',ui-monospace,monospace; font-size:10.5px; font-weight:600; letter-spacing:.14em; text-transform:uppercase; color:#1AA06E; border:1.5px solid #1AA06E; border-radius:999px; padding:5px 13px; opacity:.9; transform:rotate(-4deg); }

narrative.overview: Two voices share one surface. A maker's serif (Newsreader) names each creation with warmth; a registrar's mono (JetBrains Mono) records it with precision; and a calm sans (Manrope) runs the controls in between. The atelier is bright, paper-white, and uncluttered. The ledger is exact: every digital human is an accessioned asset with a serif name, a REG · DH-2041 number, a version history, a license, and an archival seal. Cyan is the ink reserved for the active entry. This is a mobile-first H5 product surface, not a marketing page. It rejects the SaaS dark-dashboard reflex and decorative color in equal measure: the shipped 清爽 skin keeps one cyan for action and live state, a small sanctioned secondary palette for identity and wayfinding, and calm gray for dense category chips. The feel is clinical-warm: cool-white paper, hairline cool-gray rules, and soft blue-tuned shadows, warmed by the serif identity layer and rounded corners.
keyCharacteristics: Cool paper-white surfaces (#F7F9FB canvas, #FFFFFF cards), never pure black-on-white.
One cyan accent (#12B3DE), touching under a tenth of any screen.
Three type voices with three jobs: serif identity, mono record, sans control.
Rounded cards floating on soft, blue-tuned shadows, no harsh elevation.
Mobile-native: real safe areas, a bottom 5-tab bar with a raised center create key.
Disciplined color: one cyan for action/live, a small sanctioned secondary palette for identity and wayfinding, calm gray for dense category chips.

rules.name: The One Ink Rule
rules.body: Cyan (#12B3DE) is reserved for primary action and live/active state. Selection among options (filter pills, view tabs) is ink, not cyan, so the two signals never blur. Cyan is never decoration; on any given screen it touches under a tenth of the pixels. Its rarity is the meaning.

rules.name: The Sanctioned Palette Rule
rules.body: Beyond cyan, a small named secondary palette is permitted for identity and wayfinding only: downstream-app identity (Music Violet #7C5CE6, Commerce Orange #E8884A, Drama Blue #3E63C8), creation path (AI-Original Violet #8F6BFF vs Real-Person Cyan), and the storage breakdown (video #1AA06E, 3D #D9920E, voice #8A6BFF). Solid icon/bar/badge fills only. Dense derivative-category chips in the asset grid stay Muted Slate (#5A6873) + icon for calm; color is earned by top-level identity surfaces, not by every list row.

rules.name: The No-Decorative-Glow Rule
rules.body: Secondary colors are solid marks, never full-screen radial-glow beds. No violet or pink blurred blooms behind login, create, or hero screens; at most one faint cyan wash (var(--primary-tint)) over paper.

rules.name: The No-Pure-Black, No-Pure-White Rule
rules.body: Text is Deep Slate Ink (#14202B), not #000. Canvas is cool Paper (#F7F9FB), not #FFF. Every neutral is tuned toward the slate-blue hue.

rules.name: The Three-Voice Rule
rules.body: Serif names assets, mono records facts, sans runs controls. Never cross them: no serif on a button, no mono in a paragraph, no sans on an asset's identity name.

rules.name: The Serif-Is-Sacred Rule
rules.body: Newsreader appears only as an asset's name. It is the product's one moment of warmth; spending it on headings, buttons, or marketing copy cheapens it.

rules.name: The Lift-On-Touch Rule
rules.body: Cards rest at Resting shadow and rise to Raised with a -2 to -3px translateY on hover or press. Elevation is a response to interaction, not a permanent decoration.

rules.name: The Blue-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Every shadow uses rgba(20,36,55,...), the slate-blue ink, never neutral black. Black shadows would read as a different, colder product.

dos: Do keep cyan (#12B3DE) under a tenth of any screen, spent only on active, primary, or live state (The One Ink Rule).
Do name digital humans in Newsreader serif, and use serif nowhere else (The Serif-Is-Sacred Rule).
Do keep dense derivative-category chips Muted Slate + icon; reserve the sanctioned secondary palette for identity surfaces (apps, storage, creation paths).
Do tune every neutral and every shadow toward the slate-blue ink (rgba(20,36,55,...)): text #14202B, canvas #F7F9FB.
Do rest cards flat at Resting shadow and lift them -2 to -3px on touch.
Do use real env(safe-area-inset-*); this is a true H5 app, not a framed phone preview.
Do show skeletons (.m-skel) while loading, not spinners mid-content.
Do route destructive actions through the Confirm dialog and report results with toasts.
donts: Don't use #000 or #fff; both read as a different, colder product.
Don't use decorative full-screen radial-glow beds (violet/pink blurred blooms behind login, create, or hero); at most one faint cyan wash over paper.
Don't color dense derivative-category chips in the asset grid; those stay Muted Slate + icon. Color is for top-level identity surfaces (apps, storage, creation paths).
Don't use window.confirm, alert, or prompt; use the Confirm dialog and toasts (a repo-wide rule).
Don't put serif on buttons, headings, or body, put mono in paragraphs, or put sans on an asset's identity name.
Don't add side-stripe borders (border-left color accents), gradient text (background-clip: text), or decorative glassmorphism. The only blurs are the frosted tab bar and sheet backdrops.
Don't make the active filter pill cyan; selection among filters is ink, action is cyan.
Don't use black or hard drop-shadows; depth is soft, diffuse, and blue-tuned.
Don't revive the iPhone shell or fake WeChat chrome (status bar, capsule, home bar); v0.3 removed them on purpose.
